purpose: Lazy routing index for Accessibility Agents Codex router skills and accessibility-lead.
usage: For broad or ambiguous accessibility tasks, start with accessibility-lead.
Use this index to select specialist references and Codex subagents, then read only the selected files.
Include extension agents from installed extension registries when their domains or triggers match.

agents.name: a11y-tool-builder
